title: Trello important with every detail

posts.author: Wijcky (Kurt Wijckmans)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are in the proces of migrating everything from Basecamp / Trello into Monday. We tried with the standard Trello import, but a lot of data is not importing very clean, so we did a lot of manual import.

But now we have a very complicated Trello board with a lot of data and what’s more important, we need to know who posted something on the Trello board. So we want to import everything in detail into Monday.

Is there a good way to do this?

Thanks in advance,

Kurt

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @Wijcky - We have done quite a few data migrations from Trello using Make.com. That lets us pull in everything nicely - comments, attachments, images, etc. It takes a while to set up and test, plus you’ll need to make sure your target board(s) for the import are “final” before building your migration utility in Make. That’s the best way to migrate your data from Trello completely.

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP
Gold monday․com Partner / Advanced Solution Delivery Partner
CEO & Principal Consultant, Polished Geek

posts.cookedHtml:

Any tutorials on how to do this?

posts.author: Jamie-Carten (Jamie Carten)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, did you end up using Make? I am in the same boat and I need to migrate my data from Trello to Monday.

posts.author: Jonathan-Miller (Jonathan Miller)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve recently gone through the same struggle of transferring our data from Trello to Monday. We used Altosio to do the migration. Highly recommend this tool. Easy to use and leaves nothing behind.

Altosio

Trello to Monday.com Migration

Altosio is a great tool to migrate your Trello boards to Monday.com boards. Exporting Trello to Monday has never been this easy!
